description: Merge multiple FCS data files into a single FCS datasets; includes multimple subsampling options.
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## MergeFCSDataFiles GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MergeFCSDataFiles is a GenePattern module that Merge multiple FCS data files into a single FCS datasets; includes multimple subsampling options.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: Input.files, Output.file.name
- Optional: Subsampling.rate, Keep.n.events, Random.seed

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>mergefcsdatafiles.jar <Input.files> <Output.file.name> <Subsampling.rate> <Keep.n.events> <Random.seed>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Input.files
parameters.description: The input FCS files to be merged; either a zip file or a pointer to a directory or a text file with FCS file names (full path) with one filename per line.

parameters.name: Subsampling.rate
parameters.description: Subsampling rate as percentage of events to be included from each data set, value between 0 and 100, optional, default 100%, cannot be combined with keep n events.

parameters.name: Keep.n.events
parameters.description: Keep approximately n events from each dataset, optional, cannot be combined with subsampling rate.
